---
title: "Random Forest"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-24"
---
Libary load
```{r}
library(randomForest)
```


Create the rf model
```{r}
ct_rf <- randomForest(x = cq[, 4:13], y=as.factor(cq$cq), nodesize = 10, ntree = 100) #x can refer to the columns refering to, y is the present / absent
#nodesize = 10 to not overfit the data, run faster
#ntree for speed and limit area
# strata makes a potentially biaseed data smaller

```
